title: [MooreToCore] Unexpected topological cycle after importing generated verilog

features.name: ordered partial assignments with self-referential bit-select
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit wire where one bit is assigned an external input and another bit is assigned a bit-select of the same wire (reading a previously assigned bit)

features.name: bit-select assignment to unpacked array wire
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array wire with bit-select assignments where one assignment reads from the input and another assignment reads from a previously assigned bit of the same wire
